title: ChatGPT Toolkit: Prompt Library Shortcut Experience Improvement
target_scope: Prompt Library Shortcut Area and Collapsible Main Panel

baseline.description: ChatGPT Toolkit main panel is always expanded. Prompt Library is a separate popup. No quick access to prompts in the main panel. Category selection is currently not persisted.

constraints: Must use shared data source with existing Prompt Library
Clicking title only copies content (Schema A)
Persistence of collapse state, sort preference, and category selection
Filtering must wait for persisted category to be loaded
Maintain existing UI behavior when expanded
Prompt shortcut list must have dynamic height (up to 60vh) and items must not squash
Add 'Show/Hide Timeline' button in the shortcut area (collapsed state)
